title: Automated Emails By Board, Not By Task
excerpt: We need to be able to send automated emails for unfinished tasks to assignees in boards.  Currently with the automated emails, assignees get an email per task.  For one project, an assignee may have a dozen tasks, so thi…

posts.author: steeleangel (Jessica Angel)
posts.cookedHtml: We need to be able to send automated emails for unfinished tasks to assignees in boards. Currently with the automated emails, assignees get an email per task. For one project, an assignee may have a dozen tasks, so this floods their inbox. We need to be able to send a single email that summarizes the open tasks in a board and includes a link to the board.
